code: import{useState}from"react";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function App(){const[url,setUrl]=useState("");const[result,setResult]=useState("");const[loading,setLoading]=useState(false);const runTestHandler=async()=>{if(!url){setResult("Please enter a URL");return;}setLoading(true);setResult("");try{const res=await fetch(`${process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL}/run-test`,{method:"POST",headers:{"Content-Type":"application/json"},body:JSON.stringify({url})});const data=await res.json();setResult(data.message);}catch{setResult("❌ Error connecting to backend");}setLoading(false);};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{style:{textAlign:"center",marginTop:"80px",fontFamily:"Arial"},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{children:"QA360 Dashboard \uD83D\uDE80"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"text",placeholder:"Enter website URL",value:url,onChange:e=>setUrl(e.target.value),style:{padding:"10px",width:"300px"}}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("br",{}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("br",{}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:runTestHandler,children:loading?"Running...":"Run Test"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:result})]});}export default App;
